title: Bee Drops│蜜蜂戰利品
description: Bee will drop Flowers when killed.│蜜蜂被擊殺時會掉落花。
body:
⚠️ This data pack requires the data pack [Records the Level of Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/records-the-level-of-fortune-and-looting-enchantments).│這個資料包需要資料包[記錄附魔的等級](https://modrinth.com/datapack/records-the-level-of-fortune-and-looting-enchantments)。 ⚠️
# Function│功能
Bee will drop 0-2 Random small flowers except Eyeblossom, Wither Rose, and Torchflower (maybe mixed) when killed, and each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon will increase the drop limit by 1.│蜜蜂被擊殺後會掉落0-2朵除了眼眸花、凋零玫瑰、火把花之外的隨機小型花（可能混搭），武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使掉落數量的上限+1。
